categories.name: Data Integration
categories.description: Ability to ingest, harmonize, and manage diverse data sources including genomic, epidemiological, clinical, and environmental data.

subcriteria.name: Multi-source data ingestion
subcriteria.description: Support for diverse data formats and sources

subcriteria.name: Data harmonization
subcriteria.description: Ability to standardize and reconcile disparate datasets

subcriteria.name: API availability
subcriteria.description: Programmatic data access and exchange capabilities

subcriteria.name: Real-time data feeds
subcriteria.description: Support for streaming and real-time data ingestion

subcriteria.name: Data quality management
subcriteria.description: Automated quality checks and data validation

categories.name: Analytics Capability
categories.description: Sophistication and breadth of analytical tools for pathogen characterization, outbreak detection, and trend analysis.

subcriteria.name: AMR prediction
subcriteria.description: Antimicrobial resistance gene detection and prediction

categories.name: Visualization
categories.description: Quality and interactivity of data visualization tools for exploration, communication, and decision support.

categories.name: Accessibility
categories.description: Ease of use, deployment options, and availability across different contexts and user skill levels.

subcriteria.name: Mobile compatibility
subcriteria.description: Responsive design and mobile app support

subcriteria.name: Multi-language support
subcriteria.description: Interface and documentation in multiple languages

categories.name: Scalability
categories.description: Ability to handle increasing data volumes, user loads, and geographic expansion.

categories.name: Documentation
categories.description: Completeness and quality of technical documentation, user guides, and developer resources.

categories.name: Community Support
categories.description: Strength of user community, developer ecosystem, and ongoing maintenance commitment.

categories.name: Security & Compliance
categories.description: Data security measures, privacy protections, and regulatory compliance capabilities.

categories.name: Interoperability
categories.description: Support for data exchange standards and integration with external systems.

subcriteria.name: Standard file formats
subcriteria.description: Support for FASTA, VCF, CSV, JSON, etc.

categories.name: Real-Time Capability
categories.description: Support for real-time data processing, alerting, and rapid response workflows.
